form.formComment: Had two starts to date. At big odds at debut, 7th of 16 at Scottsville on February 18 over 1100m, 6 len behind Lady Godiva with 60kg at $34. Second-up 5th of 11 at this track on March 27 over 1000m, 2 len behind Flower Tryst with 60kg at $21. Not far from the winner at second outing. This race is well within her grasp.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-10.5). Had two starts to date. At big odds at debut, 7th of 16 at Scottsville on February 18 over 1100m, 6 len behind Lady Godiva with 60kg at $34. Second-up 5th of 11 at this track on March 27 over 1000m, 2 len behind Flower Tryst with 60kg at $21. Not far from the winner at second outing. This race is well within her grasp.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 52-day let-up. At the latest run 9th of 16 at Scottsville on February 18 over 1200m, 11 len behind Steamy Windows with 56.1kg at $5. The start before that 2nd of 10 at Scottsville on January 11 over 1000m, neck behind Ode To The Sea carrying 57.5kg at $7. Given a let-up and back in trip after a below par run latest. Placed 2/3 this trip and will take catching.

form.formComment: Having third race start. At debut, 7th of 9 at Scottsville on February 8 over 1000m, 8 len behind Durban Diamond carrying 60kg at $15. Second-up ran last of 9 at Scottsville on March 1 over 1000m, 10 len behind Japura carrying 60kg at $76. Might just find this lot a bit smart.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation fourth of 9 at Vaal January 29 over 1000m, 7 len behind Secretary Bird carrying 60kg at $8.50. On debut third of 7 at Turffontein Standside December 7 over 800m, 2.5 len behind Volcanic Heat with 60kg at $15. Showed ability in first campaign. Expect a forward showing.
